summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Zairyx digital menu SaaS landing page. All features tested successfully including new Savings Calculator with interactive sliders and Scroll Reveal animations. Mobile responsiveness verified.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct headline 'Receba mais pedidos direto no WhatsApp'
Hero CTAs visible and clickable (Ver modelos prontos + Falar com especialista)
Social proof strip displays exactly 4 metrics
Pain vs Solution comparison section renders correctly
Savings Calculator section renders with data-testid='savings-calculator-section'
Revenue slider (data-testid='revenue-slider') is fully interactive
Commission slider (data-testid='commission-slider') is fully interactive
All 6 preset buttons work correctly (R$ 5.000, 10.000, 15.000, 20.000, 30.000, 50.000)
Monthly loss and annual savings display correct calculated values
Calculator CTA buttons present (Parar de perder dinheiro + Quero uma demonstração)
How it works section displays exactly 3 step cards
Benefits section renders correctly
Templates section displays exactly 6 template cards
FAQ accordion with exactly 6 expandable questions - all functional
Final CTA section with guarantee messaging (30 dias garantia)
Mobile responsiveness verified across all sections
Scroll reveal animations trigger correctly on scroll
All CTAs are clickable and functional
Calculator performs real-time calculations correctly
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality works perfectly
